description_of_development: To construct a Community Recreation Services Use building and to develop a Publicly Accessible Private Park (playground, water park, multi-functional sports field and Accessory maintenance / storage building).  The Community Recreation Services building will initially operate as a Residential Sales Centre for a period of up to 10 years.
To construct a Single Detached House with front attached Garage, Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling), fireplace, elevator, and veranda.
To construct and extend the underground parkade of a Multi-unit Housing and to relocate the ramp entrance and alter the grading and landscaping on the ground.
To construct exterior alterations to a Multi-unit Housing building (replacement of heat tracer on parkade ramp)

To construct a Single Detached House with front attached Garage, Unenclosed Front Porch, front and rear balconies, sunroom, fireplace, elevator, rear uncovered deck (14.17m x 4.27m) and a walkout Basement.

To construct and operate a 141.3 meter high mixed Use Tower with Commercial podium including a common lobby, eight (8) General Retail Stores, three (3) Restaurants (60% of total Floor Area as Public Space), four (4) Professional, Financial and Office Support Services, one (1) Spectator Entertainment Establishment (movie theatre) with accessory Non-Residential Amenity Area including a publicly accessible outdoor landscaped area and multi-purpose room on the rooftop podium; with an Apartment Housing Tower (568 Dwelling units from the 4th to 41st floors) with accessory Residential Amenity Area; with mechanical rooms on the 42nd and 43rd floors.
To demolish and construct exterior alterations to an existing Religious Assembly (rebuild and extend landing and barrier-free ramp).
To construct a Single Detached House with uncovered deck and Covered wheelchair ramp from garage to house.
To construct a Residential Use building in the form of a Single Detached House with Wheelchair ramp.
To construct exterior alterations to a Single Detached House (temporary accessibility ramp, valid until April 30, 2017).
To construct interior (basement renovations) and exterior alterations (adding a wheelchair ramp at the front, and to develop at grade decks at the back) to Semi-detached House building.

To construct a Single Detached House with rear Garage attached via a breezeway connection, Unenclosed Front Porch, balcony, rooftop patio, Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling), fireplace, elevator and to demolish an existing Single Detached House.

To construct a Single Detached House with front attached Garage, Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling), rear uncovered deck (3.05m x 4.11m), Unenclosed Front Porch and Elevator.

To construct interior and exterior alterations to a 4 storey high mixed-use building (parkade ramp shifting with some parking reconfiguration, stair location shifted to accommodate revised dwelling units - total 45 dwellings, revised elevations, reference approved DP #416139755-002)

To construct Exterior Alterations of a Residential Use building in the form 16 Dwelling Multi-unit Housing building (alterations to DP: 472557075-002) Building 'I', (added a ramp, removed windows and adjusted interior alterations)
To construct a rear uncovered deck (6.20 m x 3.17 m @ 0.80 m in Height) with a rear accessible ramp.

To construct a Single Detached House with front and side attached Garages, Unenclosed Front Porch, balconies, uncovered deck and covered deck over walkout Basement, rooftop terrace, elevator, sunroom with wet bar, and Basement development with wet bar (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling).

To construct a Single Detached House with front attached Garage, Unenclosed Front Porch, rear uncovered deck (14.38 m x 3.38 m), rear covered deck (9.75 m x 4.22 m), side covered deck (9.27 m x 5.33 m), fireplaces, elevator, Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling) and balcony.
To construct a front uncovered deck (12.19 m x 1.65 m @0.91 m in height) with ramp and privacy screening (1.52 m in height).

To change the use of a Personal Service Shop to a Professional Office, and construct an addition and exterior alterations to the existing building (new elevator addition, barrier free ramp, front yard landscaping and deck).
To construct a Multi-unit Housing building (293 Dwellings) with an underground parkade and a Publicly Accessible Private Park.
To construct exterior alterations to an existing Apartment Housing/General Retail Stores building (ramp for east entrance encroaching onto 101 Street NW).
To revise the design of an approved Child Care Service (construct exterior alterations including new windows, build barrier-free ramp and new entrance for barrier-free ramp, change fence material).
To construct exterior alterations (includes removal of rooftop patio, and addition of accessibility ramp at south entrance) to an Apartment House building.

To revise the design and to construct an addition; increase the Dwelling units from 158 to 163 for the Multi-unit Housing Use; and to construct exterior alterations (double height ground floor Commercial Uses reduced to single Storey along 102 Avenue and the corner of 123 Street; added chiller with mechanical screening on rooftop, increase in Height from 21.0 m to 21.7 m and increase in Amenity Area) to the building; and to construct exterior alterations to the Site (modifications to the landscaping, hardscaping and street furniture); and to reduce Public Space on the ground level with two (2) Specialty Food Services (Public Space of 64.4 m2 reduced to 62.41 m2, and 64.4 m2 reduced to 59.48 m2) and three (3) Restaurants (Public Space of 89.6 m2 reduced to 86.6 m2, and Public Space of 86.8 m2 reduced to 80.89 m2, and Public Space of 125.3 m2 reduced to 119.06 m2); and to change the Use of one (1) Restaurant to Specialty Food Services and to reduce the Public Space from 55.3 m2 to 50.4 m2); and to construct interior alterations (increase of underground vehicular parking stalls from 190 to 209 (consisting of an increase from 62 to 65 vehicular parking stalls as Vehicle Parking Use and an increase from 128 to 144 Accessory vehicular parking stalls for Multi-unit Housing Use and alterations to the underground parkade ramp); and increase in bicycle parking stalls from 91 to 94, to a mixed-Use building with Commercial Uses on the ground level. (Reference: Development Permit number 402632186-002)

To change the Use of 3 Apartment House Dwelling Units to 1 Lodging House Sleeping Unit and to construct interior alterations (expand office space, and add barrier-free washroom and salon for Shepherd's Care)

To construct a Single Detached House with an Unenclosed Front Porch, balcony, rear covered deck (4.83m x 4.50m), rear attached Garage, rooftop patio, elevator, fireplace, and Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling).
To construct exterior and interior alterations to a Dwelling within an Apartment House building (replace patio door with custom door and sidelight; install barrier-free bathroom)
To construct a Single Detached House with Unenclosed Front Porch, Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling), fireplace, elevator and rear platform structure.
To construct a Single Detached House with attached Garage, side landing two covered decks, Unenclosed Front Porch, underground Garage ramp and to demolish a Single Detached House.
To move on a Mobile Home and to construct a side uncovered deck (2.44m x 3.05m) and wheelchair access ramp.
To construct exterior (new parkade access ramp from 92 Street) and interior alterations (convert basement storage space to underground parkade) to an existing Apartment Housing
To change the Use of one Dwelling inside an approved Multi-unit House to a Residential Sales Centre (maximum two years) and to construct exterior alterations (access ramps)
To change the use from a Single Detched house with Secondary Suite to a Limited Group Home (max 6 residents) and to construct a rear landing (2.59m x 3.96m) with wheelchair accessable ramp.

To construct a Residential Use Single Detached House with two front attached Garages with breezeway, balconies, elevator, Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling) with Garage and wet bar, covered deck, fireplaces and walkout Basement.
To construct 3 Dwellings of Row Housing with verandas, uncovered rear decks, wooden ramp and to operate a Residential Sales Center for a maximum of 2 years.

To convert a Single Detached House to a Limited Group Home (5 residents),  construct interior alterations and uncovered rear deck (7.77m x 6.7m), Pergola (1.64m x 2.43m) and ramps. (pre-application: 235655816-001)

To change the Use from a Single Detached House to a Health Service, construct an addition (1.94m x 7.28m), and to construct interior and exterior alterations (construct wheelchair ramp, rear parking area).
To construct an accessibility ramp and conduct maintenance to a non-Residential building.
To construct exterior alterations to an Apartment House (parkade ramp relocation, Building 1).

To construct a Single Detached House with front attached Garage, elevated entryway (at 1.85m above grade), Unenclosed Front Porch, Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling), rear covered deck, rooftop terrace with hot tub, elevator and fireplace.
To Construct Exterior Alterations to a Residential Development in the form of Supportive Housing (Wheelchair Lift for a Group Home)
To construct an Addition (new vestibule), exterior alterations (new front stairs & ramp) and interior alterations to an existing Religious Assembly building.
To construct an exterior alteration to an existing Religious Assembly Building (Wheelchair ramp)
To construct exterior and interior alterations to an existing Multi-unit Project Development (changes to Buildings 1, 3, 7 & 8, relocate barrier-free parking spaces, and revise landscape plan).

To construct a Residential Use building in the form of a Single Detached House with Development application is for foundation replacement.  House is to be lifted and existing foundation removed and replaced.  New basement walls to be heightened in keeping with neighbouring dwelling. .
To construct a rear uncovered deck (irregular shape @ 1.60m in Height) with a Outdoor wheel chair Porch lift (1.53m x 1.53m).
To construct a rooftop Telecommunications Facility (relocate Telus antennas from the main roof to elevator walls).
To construct an Uncovered Deck (Accessibility Ramp). Structure is free floating can be unbolted to access water utility area.

To construct uncovered decks and an addition to a Single Detached House (rear addition, 4.65m x 7.94m, rear uncovered decks 3.61m x 7.94m & 3.10m x 2.10m and front uncovered deck with lift 2.13m x 2.13m).
To construct exterior alterations to a Limited Group Home (wheel chair barrier-free access ramp in Front Yard).
To construct exterior alterations to an existing Single Detached House (front accessibility ramp, front uncovered landing @ 1.07m in Height and front uncovered Deck @ 1.19m in Height).

To construct a Single Detached House with Unenclosed Front Porch, two attached Garages (front and side), partially rear covered decks, rear covered deck (11.25m x 5.74m), fireplaces, elevator, and Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling)
To construct exterior alterations to an existing Apartment House (barrier-free ramp, railing and new stairs)

To construct a 250.8 meter high mixed Use Tower with General Retail Stores on the main Floor; General Retail Stores and Specialty Food Services (with 12,696 square meters of Public Space and 600 seats) on the 2nd Floor; and General Retail Stores and Professional, Financial and Office Support Services on the 3rd floor; Professional, Financial and Office Support Services and accessible garden roof Amenity Area on the 4th Floor; Professional, Financial and Office Support Services from the 5th to 28th Floors; mechanical on the 29th Floor; Apartment Housing (454 Dwelling units) in the upper Tower from 30th to 66th Floors where the 30th Floor has a Residential roof Amenity Area; mechanical on the 67th to 69th Floors; and pedway to connect to the adjacent proposed Hotel (legally described as Plan 1321953, Block 2, Lot 1) development on a portion of the Site (legally described as Plan 1321953, Block 2, Lot 2). (Stantec Tower)
To construct exterior alterations to a 25 Dwelling Residential Use building in the form of a Multi-unit Housing (sloped pathway and new barrier free access to the East entrance).

To construct a Semi-Detached House with Unenclosed Front Porches, accessibility ramps, Secondary Suites in the Basements, and to demolish the existing Single Detached House and Accessory building (rear detached Garage).
To construct an addition (enclosure for wheelchair ramp) to a Single Detached House.

To convert a Single Detached House to a Child Care Service Use (49 Children) and to construct interior and exterior (convert attached garage to usable floor space and construct an outdoor landing 1.0m x 1.0m @ 1.47m in height with ramp).
To convert a Single Detached House to a (Limited Group Home with four residents and to construct exterior alterations (wheelchair ramp).
To construct an addition (elevator / lobby enclosure) to a Religious Assembly building
To construct exterior alterations to a Mobile Home (barrier-free access ramp).
To construct exterior alterations to an existing Single Detached House (wheelchair ramp).

To construct an Addition, Exterior Alterations and Interior Alterations to a Child Care Services Use building (maximum 189 children) (to enclose an egress stairway, expand a covered patio [3.2m x 2.4m],amend and enclose a covered barrier free access ramp and covered patio [11.3m x 2.9m], partially enclose existing second floor patio, remove window on East Facade) and to amend the Landscaping Plan (adding trees and shrubs to the front setback).
To construct an addition to a Single Detached House (rear single story addition, 6.10m x 7.32m) and a rear uncovered deck  (2.44m x 1.68m), with ramp (1.31m x 5.59m @1.22m in Height).
To construct exterior alterations to a Single Detached House (adding a wheelchair ramp).
To construct exterior alterations to a Single Detached House (temporary accessibility ramp from February 11th 2016 to September 30th, 2016).
To demolish an Essential Utility Services use building (lift station pump).

To construct interior alterations (Main floor: adding laundry room, relocating fireplace and kitchen; 2nd floor: removing bathroom walls; All floors: adding an elevator shaft) and exterior alterations (Main floor: adding 2 windows and enlarging patio door on the South side) to an existing Rowhouse.
To construct exterior alterations to an existing Single Detached House (barrier free access ramp for wheelchair, 15.54m in length in front yard).
To construct an addition (elevator shaft) to an existing Single Detached House.

To construct a Single Detached House with front attached Garage, Unenclosed Front Porch, Basement development with wet bar (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling), exterior hot tub, fireplace, roof top deck, elevator and rear uncovered deck (7.21m x 4.27m).

To construct an addition to a Single Detached House (rear cover over existing rear deck, 1.98m x 3.05m), uncovered rear deck (6.9m x 2.43m @ 0.90m high) with wheelchair ramp and landing (1.26m x 1.23m @ 0.55m high), and front uncovered deck landing (1.32m x 1.68m @ 0.9m in High), existing without permits.
To construct exterior alterations to a Single Detached House (glass elevator overrun, door change at swimming pool room, new chimney, extension of wall above swimming pool room).
To construct a Side Uncovered deck (wheelchair ramp - 1.83m x 14.63m at 1.07m in height).
To construct a side uncovered deck to a mobile home (11.28m x 1.52m @ 0.81m in Height) with accessibility ramp.

To change the Use from a Single Detached House to a Restaurant (81.5 square meters of Public Space with 59 seats in interior) with an accessory fenced, outdoor patio (24.2 square meters of Public Space with 16 seats); and to construct exterior and interior alterations (new entry door, deck, stair, wheelchair lift and outdoor patio space).

To construct a Single Detached House with front attached Garage, Unenclosed Front Porch, elevator, rear covered deck (9.14m x 4.60m), fireplace, hot tub, side door entrance (with landing), and Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling).

To construct a Single Detached House with an Unenclosed Front Porch,  attached Garage, rear uncovered deck (6.64m x 3.68m), fireplace, elevator, Basement Development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling), and Rooftop Terrace.
To construct an addition to a Religious Assembly building (elevator shaft).

To construct a front uncovered deck with wheelchair lift (2.13m x 2.13m @ 0.56m in Height) and interior/ exterior alterations (main floor renovation and enlarging front door) to an existing Single Detached House.

To amend the approved Development Permit number 234919092-001 by increasing the Height from 141.3 to 142.0 meter high mixed Use Tower; and reducing the Commercial podium from 3 to 2 Storeys including a common lobby, nine (9) General Retail Stores, three (3) Restaurants (60% of total Floor Area as Public Space), one (1) Professional, Financial and Office Support Services, with accessory Non-Residential Amenity Area including accessible outdoor rooftop podium; with an Apartment Housing Tower (adding a floor of Residential Use and increasing Dwelling units from 568 to 582 from the 3rd to 41st floors), with accessory Residential Amenity Area (indoor and outdoor rooftop podium); and an Urban Garden (66 garden plots) on the rooftop podium; and mechanical rooms on the 42nd floor; and to construct exterior and interior alterations.

To construct a Single Detached House with rear attached Garage, Unenclosed Front Porch, rear covered deck (6.00m x 3.66m), balcony, fireplace, rooftop patio, wet bar, elevator, Garage level development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling) and to develop a Secondary Suite in the Basement.
To construct exterior alterations to a Single Detached House, (front uncovered deck, irregular shape 2.68m x 2.54m @ 0.41m in Height with Accessibility Ramp, 1.10m x 5.69m).
To construct exterior alterations (accessibility ramp for the main entrance) to an existing Apartment House (Sundance Housing Co-op).

To construct a Residential Use building in the form of a Single Detached House with unenclosed front porch, rear ramp, Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling) for DAY CARE USE.

A revision to DP 377204962-002: To reduce the number of Dwellings from 212 to 176 and reduce the height of the building, relocate the ramp and waste collection area, and construct exterior and interior alterations.

To construct a Single Detached House with rear attached Garage, rear covered sunroom, elevator, fireplace, Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling) and to demolish a Single Detached House and Accessory Building (detached Garage).
To construct a two-Storey Garden Suite with elevator, balcony and pergola-over-patio (main floor at 11.28m x 11.58m, second floor at 9.45m x 7.32m), and to demolish a detached Garage.

To construct exterior and interior alterations to an approved development permit 139391997-001 (Apartment Housings Building 1 reduced from 91 to 87 Dwelling units and Building 2 increased from 59 to 63 Dwelling units and to relocate ramp on Building 2) and reconfigure location of Row Housings and Semi-detached House. Total number of Dwellings: 150.

To construct a Single Detached House with an Unenclosed Front Porch,  attached Garage, rear uncovered deck (6.64m x 3.68m), fireplace, elevator, Basement Development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling), and Rooftop Terrace.

To construct a Single Detached House with two front attached Garages, Unenclosed Front Porch, 4 balconies, rear 4 season room (5.59m x 3.66m), rear partially covered deck, elevator, roof top deck, fireplaces and Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling).

To construct a Residential Use building in the form of a Single Detached House with front attached Garages, rear covered deck (12.65m x 4.88m), unenclosed front porch, fireplace, elevator, balcony, wet bar on third floor, and Basement development with wet bar (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling).
To construct a Garden Suite with balcony and Elevator.
To construct a addition and exterior alterations to a Single Detached House (enclose portion of rear porch, 3.96m x 1.68m, and add elevator and alteration to the main and basement).
To construct a side uncovered deck to a Single Detached House (extention of front deck to the back of house for wheelchair access, approx 1.2m x 16.30m)

To construct a Single Detached House with front attached Garage, unenclosed front porch, elevator, front balconies, rooftop terrace and Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling).
To construct an uncovered deck to a Single Detached House (5.35m x 7.63m @ 0.91m in Height, extended off of the landing of an accessability ramp).

To construct exterior alterations (removal of two exterior doors and add glazing for future tenant fit-out on the east facade on the ground floor level to a mixed Use Tower (9 General Retail Stores, 3 Restaurants (60% of total Floor Area as Public Space), 1 Professional, Financial and Office Support Services, with accessory Non-Residential Amenity Area including accessible outdoor rooftop podium; with an Apartment Housing Tower with accessory Residential Amenity Area (indoor and outdoor rooftop podium); and an Urban Garden on the rooftop podium (reference Development Permit number 234919092-007). (Ice District, Building BG)
To increase the occupancy of a Child Care Service within a Residential Single Detached House from 24 to 39 children and construct interior and exterior alterations (accessibility ramp).

To construct exterior alterations by revising the parking layout (same number of parking spaces), and barrier free access encroaching onto City Road Right-of-Way, and rehabilitating the existing landscaping for an existing Multi-unit Housing.

To construct exterior alterations to a Community Service building (Religious Assembly), new exit doors, and stairs and wheel chair ramp. Encroachments existing without agreement, reference DP #310900581-001.
To construct interior alterations to a Single Detached House (installing an elevator, 1.38m x 1.35m)

To construct a Residential Use building in the form of a Single Detached House with a front attached Garage, balcony, Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling), covered deck, elevator, fireplace, uncovered deck and unenclosed front porch and EXTERIOR HOT TUB.

To amend the approved Development Permit number 234919092-007 by constructing an addition of a Restaurant / Bar and Neighbourhood Pub to Level 3 (podium rooftop) by increasing the overall total Floor Area of 739 square meters to an approved mixed Use Tower that includes the common lobby, nine (9) General Retail Stores, an increase from three (3) to four (4) Restaurants and to change the Use to three (3) of the Restaurants (B, C and D) to Restaurants / Bars and Neighbourhood Pubs (1,753 square meters of Public Space with 879 seats, where 876.5 square meters of Public Space and 440 seats is dedicated to Restaurant and 876.5 square meters of Public Space and 439 seats is dedicated to Bars and Neighbourhood Pubs), with an attached accessory exterior outdoor rooftop patio with 1,175 square meters of Public Space with 397 seats; one (1) Professional, Financial and Office Support Services; with accessory Non-Residential Amenity Area including accessible outdoor rooftop podium; with an Apartment Housing Tower (Dwelling units of 582 from the 3rd to 41st floors), with accessory Residential Amenity Area (indoor and outdoor rooftop podium); and an Urban Garden (reduction from 66 to 44 garden plots) on the rooftop podium; and mechanical rooms on the 42nd floor; and to construct exterior and interior alterations.

To construct a Residential Use building in the form of a Single Detached House with a front attached Garage, unenclosed front porch, partially covered deck (10.21m x 6.35m), sunken patio, balcony, Rooftop Terrace, fireplace, elevator, and Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling).
To construct exterior alterations (relocation of ramp to underground parkade) to an Apartment House building with 160 Dwellings.
To construct a front uncovered deck (wheelchair ramp, irregular shape,  4.88m X 6.71m @ 1.22m in height).
To construct exterior alterations to an existing Religious Assembly building (adding an entryway ramp and stairs to the east side of the building).

To construct an addition and exterior alterations to a Religious Assembly building (Demolition of existing front addition, front facade improvement including new entryway and wheelchair ramp; new vestibule at south west corner of building)

To construct a Single Detached House with front attached Garage, Unenclosed front porch, elevator, Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling) with wet bar, fireplaces, main floor partially covered deck  (17.98m x 5.79m with Balcony above 6.71m x 6.40m, rear sunken patio and walkout Basement.

To construct a two-Storey Garden Suite with balcony and elevator (10.05m x 7.93m).
To construct an uncovered deck (1.76m x 20.86m at 0.45m in Height) and a wheelchair ramp (1.20m x 6.20m) in the Side Yard.

To construct a Single Detached House, fireplace, elevator, veranda (3.05m x 2.44m), uncovered rear deck (triangle shaped 5.6mx 6.9m), Basement development with wet bar (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling) and to demolish the existing Single Detached House
To construct an Addition to a Single Detached House (porch with ramp 2.52m x 6.39m)(existing without permits)
To construct an uncovered deck to Single Detached House, existing without permits (1.52m x 6.22m @ 0.76m in Height with access ramp).
To construct a Residential Use building in the form of a 3 Dwelling Backyard House with elevator.

To construct a Single Detached House with an Unenclosed Front Porch, rear attached Garage,  rear uncovered deck (6.20m x 3.51m), irregular shape rear covered deck (4.71m x 4.43m), indoor swimming pool & hot tub, balcony, fireplace, elevator, Basement development (NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling), and to demolish a Single Detached House and Accessory building (detached Garage).
